feat.name: Officer's Medical Training
feat.text: You received formal training in battlefield triage and wound treatment. You are trained in Medicine and can use your Intelligence modifier in place of your Wisdom modifier for Medicine checks. If you are already trained in Medicine, you instead become trained in another skill of your choosing. You gain the Battle Medicine feat.

traits.name: Commander
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the commander class.

feat.requirement: You can prepare at least three tactics.
